allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i.get\('state','?'\), i.get\('collectionGroup','?'\)\) for i in data.get\('indexes',[]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); idx=data.get\('indexes',data\) if isinstance\(data,dict\) else data; [print\(i.get\('state'\), i.get\('name',''\)\) for i in idx if 'solicit' in i.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or 'lgpd' in str\(i.get\('name',''\)\).lower\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(len\(data\),'entries'\); [print\(e.get\('resource',{}\).get\('labels',{}\).get\('service_name','?'\),e.get\('timestamp'\)\) for e in data]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); count=sum\(1 for f in data if any\(s.get\('secret'\)=='HCQ_SIGNATURE_HMAC_KEY' for s in f.get\('serviceConfig',{}\).get\('secretEnvironmentVariables'\) or []\)\); print\(f'{count} functions bound to HCQ_SIGNATURE_HMAC_KEY'\); print\('---bound functions---'\); [print\('  -', f['name'].split\('/'\)[-1]\) for f in data if any\(s.get\('secret'\)=='HCQ_SIGNATURE_HMAC_KEY' for s in f.get\('serviceConfig',{}\).get\('secretEnvironmentVariables'\) or []\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pending=[f['name'].split\('/'\)[-1] for f in data if any\('PENDING' in \(s.get\('secret'\) or ''\) for s in f.get\('serviceConfig',{}\).get\('secretEnvironmentVariables'\) or []\)]; print\('PENDING-bound functions:', pending if pending else 'NONE'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); idx=data if isinstance\(data,list\) else data.get\('indexes',[]\); [print\(i.get\('state','?'\), '-', i.get\('name',''\)\) for i in idx if 'lgpd-solicitacoes' in i.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or 'lgpdsolicitacoes' in i.get\('name',''\).lower\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i.get\('state'\), '-', '/'.join\(i.get\('name',''\).split\('/'\)[-3:]\), '-', ','.join\([f.get\('fieldPath',''\) for f in i.get\('fields',[]\)]\)\) for i in data['indexes'] if any\(x in i.get\('name',''\) for x in ['sgq-documentos','risks','insumo-movimentacoes','lgpd','records']\)]")

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\hc quality\\temp_event_page.html" -Raw -Encoding utf8; $pattern = '\(?s\)sexta, 09'; if \($content -match $pattern\) { Write-Output "Found sexta 09" } else { Write-Output "No sexta 09 found" }; $pattern2 = '\(?s\)2025-05-09'; $m = [regex]::Matches\($content, $pattern2\); Write-Output "Occurrences of 2025-05-09: $\($m.Count\)"; $pattern3 = '\(?s\)atividadeComInscricao'; if \($content -match $pattern3\) { Write-Output "Found atividadeComInscricao" })

PowerShell($excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $excel.DisplayAlerts = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\("C:\\sabrina video\\Formulário 044 - Auditoria Interna.xlsx"\); $ws = $wb.Sheets.Item\(1\); $usedRange = $ws.UsedRange; $rows = $usedRange.Rows.Count; $cols = $usedRange.Columns.Count; $output = @\(\); for \($r = 1; $r -le [Math]::Min\($rows, 100\); $r++\) { $row = @\(\); for \($c = 1; $c -le [Math]::Min\($cols, 10\); $c++\) { $val = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, $c\).Text; $row += $val }; $output += \($row -join " | "\) }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\); $output)

PowerShell($excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $excel.DisplayAlerts = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\("C:\\sabrina video\\Formulário 044 - Auditoria Interna.xlsx"\); $ws = $wb.Sheets.Item\(1\); $usedRange = $ws.UsedRange; $rows = $usedRange.Rows.Count; $cols = $usedRange.Columns.Count; $output = @\(\); for \($r = 101; $r -le [Math]::Min\($rows, 200\); $r++\) { $row = @\(\); for \($c = 1; $c -le [Math]::Min\($cols, 10\); $c++\) { $val = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, $c\).Text; $row += $val }; $output += \($row -join " | "\) }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\); "Total rows: $rows, cols: $cols"; $output)

PowerShell($excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $excel.DisplayAlerts = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\("C:\\sabrina video\\Formulário 044 - Auditoria Interna.xlsx"\); $ws = $wb.Sheets.Item\(1\); $output = @\(\); for \($r = 7; $r -le 8; $r++\) { $row = @\(\); for \($c = 1; $c -le 26; $c++\) { $val = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, $c\).Text; $row += "[$c]$val" }; $output += \($row -join " | "\) }; $output += "---"; for \($r = 9; $r -le 9; $r++\) { $row = @\(\); for \($c = 1; $c -le 26; $c++\) { $val = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, $c\).Text; $row += "[$c]$val" }; $output += \($row -join " | "\) }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\); $output)

PowerShell($excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $excel.DisplayAlerts = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\("C:\\sabrina video\\Formulário 044 - Auditoria Interna.xlsx"\); $ws = $wb.Sheets.Item\(1\); $output = @\(\); for \($r = 9; $r -le 127; $r++\) { $num = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, 1\).Text; if \($num -match '^\\d+$'\) { $ind = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, 3\).Text; $s2 = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, 11\).Text; $s3 = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, 13\).Text; $s4 = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, 15\).Text; $s5 = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, 17\).Text; $marco = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, 19\).Text; $obs = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, 21\).Text; $output += "$num;$ind;$s2;$s3;$s4;$s5;$marco;$obs" } }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\); $output)

PowerShell($excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $excel.DisplayAlerts = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\("C:\\sabrina video\\Formulário 044 - Auditoria Interna.xlsx"\); $ws = $wb.Sheets.Item\(1\); $output = @\(\); for \($r = 9; $r -le 127; $r++\) { $num = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, 1\).Text; if \($num -match '^\\d+$'\) { $ind = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, 3\).Text; $marco = $ws.Cells.Item\($r, 19\).Text; $output += "$num | $ind | $marco" } }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\); $output)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\hc quality"; $testContent = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\("test file content"\); $boundary = "----TestBoundary$\(Get-Random\)"; $body = "--$boundary`r`nContent-Disposition: form-data; name=`"file`"; filename=`"test.txt`"`r`nContent-Type: application/octet-stream`r`n`r`ntest`r`n--$boundary--`r`n"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/hmatologia2.firebasestorage.app/o?name=auditoria-geral%2Ftest%2Ftest.txt" -Method POST -ContentType "multipart/form-data; boundary=$boundary" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($json = Get-Content "C:\\hc quality\\tmp-auth-export.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.users | Where-Object { $_.email -eq 'drogafarto@gmail.com' } | Select-Object localId, email, displayName)

PowerShell(node -e "const admin = require\('firebase-admin'\); admin.initializeApp\({projectId:'hmatologia2'}\); const db = admin.firestore\(\); db.doc\('users/2C7CDajpigXfaAVAzzJVFfrhgYB2'\).get\(\).then\(d => { console.log\('userDoc exists:', d.exists\); if\(d.exists\) console.log\('activeLabId:', d.data\(\).activeLabId\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(node -e "const admin = require\('firebase-admin'\); admin.initializeApp\({projectId:'hmatologia2'}\); const db = admin.firestore\(\); db.doc\('labs/labclin-riopomba/members/2C7CDajpigXfaAVAzzJVFfrhgYB2'\).get\(\).then\(d => { console.log\('memberDoc exists:', d.exists\); if\(d.exists\) console.log\('data:', JSON.stringify\(d.data\(\)\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(node -e "const admin = require\('firebase-admin'\); admin.initializeApp\({projectId:'hmatologia2'}\); const db = admin.firestore\(\); db.collection\('auditoria-geral'\).doc\('labclin-riopomba'\).collection\('auditorias'\).limit\(1\).get\(\).then\(snap => { console.log\('auditorias count:', snap.size\); snap.forEach\(d => console.log\('id:', d.id, 'data keys:', Object.keys\(d.data\(\)\)\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(node -e "const admin = require\('firebase-admin'\); admin.initializeApp\({projectId:'hmatologia2'}\); const db = admin.firestore\(\); console.log\('databaseId:', db.databaseId || '\(default\)'\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(node -e "const admin = require\('firebase-admin'\); const app = admin.initializeApp\({projectId:'hmatologia2', storageBucket:'hmatologia2.firebasestorage.app'}\); const bucket = admin.storage\(\).bucket\(\); console.log\('bucket name:', bucket.name\); bucket.file\('auditoria-geral/labclin-riopomba/test/test/test.txt'\).save\('hello', {contentType:'text/plain'}\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('Upload OK via Admin SDK'\); return bucket.file\('auditoria-geral/labclin-riopomba/test/test/test.txt'\).delete\(\); }\).then\(\(\) => console.log\('Cleanup OK'\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('Error:', e.message\)\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(node -e "const admin = require\('firebase-admin'\); admin.initializeApp\({projectId:'hmatologia2'}\); admin.auth\(\).getUser\('2C7CDajpigXfaAVAzzJVFfrhgYB2'\).then\(u => { console.log\('customClaims:', JSON.stringify\(u.customClaims\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(node -e "const admin = require\('firebase-admin'\); admin.initializeApp\({projectId:'hmatologia2'}\); admin.firestore\(\).doc\('users/2C7CDajpigXfaAVAzzJVFfrhgYB2'\).get\(\).then\(d => { if\(d.exists\) { const data = d.data\(\); console.log\('isSuperAdmin:', data.isSuperAdmin\); console.log\('all keys:', Object.keys\(data\)\); } }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\);" 2>&1)
